title: JMI Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: JMI Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Jamia Millia Islamia Result 2026 Out for Mass Communication Entrance Test on the official website - admission.jmi.ac.in in May 2026. Candidates can check the JMI Mass Communication Entrance Result 2026, shortlist status and merit list online. Check the direct link provided here and the step-by-step process to download the Jamia Mass Communication entrance result.

content.text: Jamia Millia Islamia has officially released the JMI Mass Communication Entrance Result 2026 for the academic session 2026-27, covering various UG and PG media courses offered through AJK Mass Communication Research Centre. The result has been published online for programmes such as MA Mass Communication, MA Convergent Journalism and other related media courses as per the university admission schedule.

Jamia Millia Islamia Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - admission.jmi.ac.in. Students can check and download their JMI Mass Communication entrance result by visiting the admission portal, selecting their programme and entering the required details as instructed on the screen. After downloading the result or merit list PDF, candidates are advised to carefully verify their name, roll number, category and other details, and promptly contact the university admission authorities in case of any discrepancy using the official helpdesk channels.

JMI has released the Mass Communication Entrance Result 2026 for the 2026-27 admission session on its official admission portal. The results cover major UG and PG media programmes under AJK Mass Communication Research Centre, and candidates can access their scorecard or selection status online using the official link. Students must log in to the admission.jmi.ac.in portal or use the declared result PDFs to check their qualifying status for the next stage of the selection process.

JMI has activated the direct links to check the Mass Communication Entrance Result 2026 on its admission portal for the 2026-27 session. Candidates can access the result viewer page, select the relevant programme type and course name, and instantly view or download their results from the official JMI admission website. Using the direct links given below, students can quickly check their entrance test result, shortlist status or merit list without navigating multiple pages.

sections.heading: How to Check JMI Mass Communication Entrance Result 2026

content.text: Candidates can follow the simple steps given below to check the JMI Mass Communication Entrance Result 2026 online through the official admission portal. Make sure you keep your application details handy to quickly access the result page.

items: Visit the official JMI admission portal at https://admission.jmi.ac.in/.
On the homepage, click on the 'Entrance Results' or relevant result section link.
You may also directly open the JMI Entrance Result Viewer page.
Select the appropriate Programme Type (for example - Masters) from the drop-down menu.
Choose the Course Name such as MA (Mass Communication) / MA (Convergent Journalism) as applicable.
Click on the 'Submit' or 'View Result' option to proceed.
The JMI Mass Communication Entrance Result 2026 / merit list will appear on the screen.
Check your name, roll number, application number and result status carefully.
Download the result or merit list PDF and save it for future reference.
Take a printout of the result copy to carry during further admission or interview processes, if required.
